roa.docketEntryComment: PEO OPPOSITION ON DEF MTS FILED
DEFT NOTICE & MOTION TO SUPPRESS PURS PC1538,5; P&A - FILED
DEFT'S ADD TO CAL MOTION RELEASE TO ACM FILED

/CAL  BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THECOMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 7, 32CPC, MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:7/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: SARAH HASHEMI APPEARS ON THE BEHALF OF JACK LAMAR FROM THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO04-26-21/X: BAIL SET AT $10000/X: THE MATTER IS NOW INLOVE WAIVER/CONTD: BENCH WARRANT STAY/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:ACM & APD TO ASSIST DEFENDANT WITH FINDING HOUSING/X:PX DATE IS CONFIRMED/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO RELEASE ON ACM/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO RELEASE ON ACM IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/SHER/BAIL:10000/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE 03-15-21/DOP/X:FUTURE DATES CONFIRMED/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 04-08-21 (30TH)/ACM/CONTD: 03-17-21 TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/CONTD: 04-07-21 PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT STAY/BWLIFT:04-19-21/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:10000/BWNUM:1ST/X:   2    OF   2    BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE /NIGHTSERV/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND DEFENSE MOTION TOSUPPRESS/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/
/CAL:PHC, PREPX M12, LD 04-08-21(30TH), LD 04-26-21(60TH)/CONTD:POSSIBLE RELEASE ON ACM WITH GPS IN M12/X:FUTURE DATES IN M12 ARE CONFIRMED/
